STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LATIF, IMAN ARMENDARIZ, MONICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF IMAN LATIF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONICA ARMENDARIZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LATIF, IMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMENDARIZ, MONICA $723.52 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $853.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
